message:
test(core): add unit tests for phylodynamics and environmental-provenance

Adds 64 new unit tests:
- phylodynamics.test.ts (29 tests): jukesCantor distance, UPGMA tree building,
  clock regression, skyline computation, dN/dS selection, demo data
- environmental-provenance.test.ts (35 tests): novelty scoring, biome
  distribution, geo heatmap, provenance analysis, demo data generation

Total test count: 287 (up from 223)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
